children.name: Tailwind: text-align
children.content:
So I started to walk into the water. I won't lie to you boys, I was terrified. But I pressed on, and as I made my way past the breakers a strange calm came over me. I don't know if it was divine intervention or the kinship of all living things but I tell you Jerry at that moment, I was a marine biologist.

I don't know if it was divine intervention or the kinship of all living things but I tell you Jerry at that moment, I was a marine biologist.

I don't know if it was divine intervention or the kinship of all living things but I tell you Jerry at that moment, I was a marine biologist.

So I started to walk into the water. I won't lie to you boys, I was terrified. But I pressed on, and as I made my way past the breakers a strange calm came over me. I don't know if it was divine intervention or the kinship of all living things but I tell you Jerry at that moment, I was a marine biologist.

بدأتُ أسير نحو الماء. لن أكذب عليكم يا رفاق، كنتُ مرعوبًا. لكنني واصلتُ المسير، وبينما كنتُ أشق طريقي عبر الأمواج المتكسرة، غمرني هدوء غريب. لا أعلم إن كان تدخلاً إلهيًا أم قرابة تجمع بين جميع الكائنات الحية، ولكن أقول لك يا جيري، في تلك اللحظة، كنتُ عالم أحياء بحرية.

children.name: Regular Text with Tailwind
children.content: This is a regular text element using Tailwind classes for styling. It has 'text-center', 'text-blue-600', and 'bg-gray-100'.

children.name: Rectangle with Tailwind
children.class: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-pink-500 shadow-xl border-4 border-white

children.name: Plain Text
children.content: Plain text element without Tailwind classes.
